pageContext.name: Omegamon
pageContext.description: Digimon is joining the Dynaction series, and their first character is none other than the Royal Knight Omegamon!   This 15.74' tall action figure features faithful colors and utilizes diecast metal parts for durability and heft. Not only is this premium action figure poseable, but it comes with a dynamic 29.52' cloth cape that can take poses of its own. Omegamon includes tons of accessories for extended play such as mini figures of Taichi and Yamato that can ride on his shoulder.  Don't miss your chance to add this collectible figure to your Digimon collection today!
